1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons with high risk class (filter by label containing 'høy')

6.description: one row per parcel (deduplicate) with parcel area

8.description: attach county to parcels by intersection (parcel ∩ fylke)
